---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Hephaestus
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're facing.
Example: _"I can't do X because Hephaestus doesn't support Y."_

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

```php
// Example of what the ideal API would look like
#[Command(name: 'example')]
#[NewAttribute(...)]
final class ExampleCommand extends BaseCommand { ... }
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've already tried or considered.

## Why this belongs in Hephaestus

Explain how this feature aligns with the project philosophy (type-safe, simple API, Symfony-compatible).

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or references here.
